DLMS/COSEM codec -- golden vectors
Generated from the codec; identical to the assertions in test.c.
Format: <label> <hex bytes>. All multi-byte integers big-endian.

# A-XDR / BER length encoding (short & long form)
len 0
    00
len 127
    7F
len 128
    81 80
len 255
    81 FF
len 256
    82 01 00
len 65535
    82 FF FF
len 65536
    83 01 00 00
len 0x01020304
    84 01 02 03 04
len indefinite (BER only)
    80

# A-XDR Data -- scalar types
null-data
    00
boolean true
    03 01
boolean false
    03 00
bit-string (4 bits)
    04 04 A0
double-long -2
    05 FF FF FF FE
double-long-unsigned 123456
    06 00 01 E2 40
octet-string DEADBEEF
    09 04 DE AD BE EF
visible-string "AB"
    0A 02 41 42
utf8-string "AB"
    0C 02 41 42
bcd 0x12
    0D 12
integer -1
    0F FF
long -2
    10 FF FE
unsigned 200
    11 C8
long-unsigned 1000
    12 03 E8
long64 -2
    14 FF FF FF FF FF FF FF FE
long64-unsigned 1
    15 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 01
enum 30
    16 1E
float32 1.0
    17 3F 80 00 00
float64 1.0
    18 3F F0 00 00 00 00 00 00
date-time (12 octets)
    19 07 E6 01 0A 02 0C 1E 00 FF 88 80 00

# A-XDR Data -- containers
array[2]{ unsigned 1, unsigned 2 }
    01 02 11 01 11 02
structure{ unsigned 1, array[2]{ lu 10, lu 20 } }
    02 02 11 01 01 02 12 00 0A 12 00 14
structure{ unsigned 1, long-unsigned 0x0102 }
    02 02 11 01 12 01 02

# A-XDR Data -- compact-array
compact-array of unsigned { 1, 2, 3 }
    13 11 03 01 02 03
compact-array of structure{ u8, u16 } x2
    13 02 02 11 12 06 01 01 02 02 03 04

# BER TLV (ACSE style; ber_begin emits long-form length)
[APPLICATION 0]{ octet-string AB }
    60 81 04 04 02 41 42
high-tag-number tag [CONTEXT 0x1234]
    BF A4 34

# xDLMS LN services
get-request-normal (no sel)
    C0 01 41 00 03 01 00 01 08 00 FF 02 00
get-request-normal (sel=1, params=null)
    C0 01 41 00 03 01 00 01 08 00 FF 02 01 01 00
get-request-next (block 1)
    C0 02 41 00 00 00 01
get-response-normal (data=struct{lu,dlu,enum})
    C4 01 41 00 02 03 12 03 E8 06 00 01 E2 40 16 1E
get-response-normal (result=object-unavail)
    C4 01 41 01 0B
get-response-with-datablock (raw, last)
    C4 02 41 01 00 00 00 01 00 03 AA BB CC
set-request-normal (value=unsigned 5)
    C1 01 41 00 01 00 00 28 00 00 FF 02 00 11 05
set-response-normal (success)
    C5 01 41 00
action-request-normal (no params)
    C3 01 41 00 01 00 00 28 00 00 FF 01 00
action-response-normal (success, no ret)
    C7 01 41 00 00
data-notification (dt empty, data=unsigned 7)
    0F 00 00 00 01 00 11 07
get-request-with-list (1 entry, no sel)
    C0 03 41 01 00 03 01 00 01 08 00 FF 02 00
get-response-with-list (1 result: data=unsigned 5)
    C4 03 41 01 00 11 05
event-notification (no time, data=unsigned 7)
    C2 00 00 03 01 00 01 08 00 FF 02 11 07
exception-response (service-unknown, pdu-too-long)
    D8 02 04
exception-response (invocation-counter-error=0x2A)
    D8 01 06 00 00 00 2A

# end
